metadata.title: Expected-failure (#55): LED forward-drop window by color
metadata.description: A red LED at 10mA should sit near Vf=1.8-2.2V. To model that, the diode carries a color-specific model name (spice_model=LED_RED). The compiler emits the device line referencing LED_RED but never emits a .model card for it, so ngspice cannot simulate -> falls back to the builtin DC solver. Captured as an expected-failure linked to oracle bug #55.
metadata.author: issue-41
